PnL 30d: $1K-$75K · Win Rate: 25-60% · Buys 30d: 50-2,000 · 2x+ trades (7d): ≥1 · Avg Hold: 15min-8h · Avg Cost: <$500

⚙️ Production Pipeline
📥 WALLET DISCOVERY
Sources (every 2h, $0 cost)
• GMGN Copytrade API → 5 sort variations
• GMGN Trending Tokens → 5m / 1h / 6h
• GeckoTerminal → trending pools
• DexScreener → boosted tokens
All via FlareSolverr (Cloudflare bypass)
▼
Filters
• PnL 30d: $1K - $75K
• Win rate: 25% - 60%
• Buys 30d: 50 - 2,000
• 2x+ trades in 7d: ≥ 1
• Avg hold: 15min - 8h
• Avg cost: < $500
▼
→ shadow_wallets table
Script: wallet_discovery.py
Cron: */10 watchdog
DB: pumpalpha.db
📡 SHADOW TRACKER
Monitoring
• Helius Enhanced WS (transactionSubscribe)
• Watches ALL shadow wallets
• Detects buys: first interaction only
• Min buy: 0.1 SOL · Max MC: $40K
• Pool detect: pumpfun / pumpswap / dlmm / clmm
• CPMM blacklisted
▼
Paper Trading
• WS price engine (accountSubscribe, free)
• SL: 0.4x · TP1: 2x@25% · TP ladder to 100x
• Tiered trailing stops
• 5-min OHLC candles stored
▼
→ shadow_tracker.db
Script: shadow_tracker.py
Cron: */5 watchdog
Tables: shadow_positions, shadow_candles
💰 PRD COPY TRADER
Buy Execution
• Helius Enhanced WS → instant signal
• Fast path mcap check (0ms for pump.fun)
• DexScreener age check (always, no skip)
• First buy only (pre_amt check + DB)
• Jupiter swap · 0.11 SOL · 0.005 priority
• Copy delay: ~1-2 seconds
▼
Sell Execution
• WS price engine (event-driven, sub-second)
• Same TP ladder as shadow
• Jupiter/PumpPortal sell routing
• Slippage escalation: 25% → 40% → 60%
• 60s cooldown on failed sells
▼
→ pumpalpha.db
Script: prd_copy_trader.py
Cron: */5 watchdog
